title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Digital Products Without PayPal — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a digital creator from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, or Pakistan who wants to sell ebooks, courses, or other digital products, you've probably hit a roadblock. PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip restrict access to their services in certain countries due to 'geographic restrictions' or 'banking limitations.' This leaves you with limited options and a huge opportunity cost. Let's explore the real difference between your choices for selling digital products without PayPal and break free from these limitations once and for all.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip offer a range of services for digital creators, including payment processing, invoicing, and delivery management. However, their services come with strict terms and conditions, including geographic restrictions, which mean they won't work for creators in certain countries. In contrast, Unchained Commerce provides a fully automated, no-KYC payment solution that allows creators to sell digital products without relying on traditional payment processors.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe have a list of restricted countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, and Pakistan. Gumroad blocks access to certain regions, while Payhip has strict requirements for creators from restricted countries. Unchained Commerce, on the other hand, welcomes creators from all over the world and provides a seamless payment experience, even in the most restricted countries. Our Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration, available for just $19.99, allows buyers to pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins, making it easier for creators to reach a global audience.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Traditional payment processors like PayPal and Stripe charge high fees for transactions, often exceeding 10%. They also have strict requirements for refunds, disputes, and chargebacks, which can be time-consuming and costly. Unchained Commerce, on the other hand, offers a flat fee of 1%, making it a more cost-effective solution for digital creators. We also provide instant automated delivery, so creators can focus on producing high-quality content rather than managing payments and refunds.
Traditional payment processors like PayPal and Stripe are holding back creators from restricted countries with their outdated technology and restrictive policies.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

PayPal and Stripe require manual intervention for refunds, disputes, and chargebacks, which can be time-consuming and costly. Gumroad and Payhip offer some automation, but their solutions are often limited and require significant technical expertise. Unchained Commerce, on the other hand, provides instant automated delivery, so creators can focus on producing high-quality content rather than managing payments and refunds. Our Admin Dashboard, available for $29.99, provides real-time analytics and transaction logs, making it easier for creators to track their sales and performance.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're a digital creator from a restricted country looking for a seamless payment experience, Unchained Commerce is the clear choice. Our fully automated, no-KYC payment solution allows creators to sell digital products without relying on traditional payment processors. With our Web3 Wallet Connect frontend wallet integration, available for just $19.99, buyers can pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins, making it easier for creators to reach a global audience. Whether you're selling ebooks, courses, or other digital products, Unchained Commerce has the tools and expertise to help you succeed.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

Can I use Stripe if I am in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan? Unfortunately, no. Stripe has strict geographic restrictions that prohibit access to their services in certain countries. Instead, consider Unchained Commerce's fully automated, no-KYC payment solution, which allows creators to sell digital products without relying on traditional payment processors.
